title: Capability v1
description: One agent's capability declaration (RD-006 promotion, 'promote, don't build'): what the routing hard-filter consumes to decide whether an agent CAN take a task. Competence evidence (agent_stats success rates, benchmark_runs scores) is keyed by the same agent_id and referenced from rationale.md, not embedded here.

agent_id.description: Canonical identity: 'harness@model' (e.g. claude_code@claude-sonnet-4-6) or a bare legacy harness name. The same key joins agent_stats and benchmark_runs.

supports_types.description: Task types the agent can take (hard filter).

supports_languages.description: Languages the agent can take (hard filter).

max_concurrent.description: Slot capacity: candidates with no free slot are filtered.
